title: Mediterranean Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry featuring Mediterranean ingredients

ingredients.name: Stir Fry Vegetables
ingredients.amount: 1 cup mixed ( bell peppers, carrots, broccoli )

instructions: Heat Mediterranean Olive Oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add Garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add Stir Fry Vegetables and cook until tender.
Stir in Pickled Red Onions and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Top with Feta Cheese and Fresh Parsley.
Season with Salt and Black Pepper to taste.
